mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N'
mapper.sql: SELECT REPORT_NO , USER_ID , REPORT_CATEGORY , BOARD_TYPE , CONTENT , CREATE_DATE , UPDATED , DELETED , TARGET_NO , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT_BOARD R2 WHERE R2.TARGET_NO = REPORT_BOARD.TARGET_NO AND R2.BOARD_TYPE = REPORT_BOARD.BOARD_TYPE AND R2.DELETED = 'N' ) COUNT FROM REPORT_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N'
mapper.select: ORDER BY REPORT_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT_BOARD WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND TARGET_NO = #{targetNo} AND BOARD_TYPE = #{boardType} AND DELETED = 'N'
